pageContext.name: Fall Guys Pack 01: Movie Star & Chicken Costume
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya introduce from the hit platform battle royale video game Fall Guys, the Fall Guys Pack 01: Movie Star & Chicken Costume Action Figure!  Pack 01 features the Movie Star starter color and the iconic Chicken costume from Season 1.  The Fall Guys can wear the costumes by simply putting them over their upper body parts and replacing their lower body parts. The arms can be interchanged to recreate a range of poses, such as running or taunting. Not only that, there are three colors of face parts plus 'Hearts' and 'Lightning' stickers.  In addition, the Fall Guys in this pack are compatible with others in the series, so you can customize your own beans just like in the game. Every Fall Guy in the series also comes with a stand, props, and a crown. Make your desk a new stage for this unexpectedly massive line up!
